error_signature: Can’t determine which item to use
title: Error determining item in Fetch Call Details node
symptom: The Fetch Call Details node throws an error stating 'Can’t determine which item to use' when trying to fetch call details after a Split In Batches node.
not_this_if: The IF node condition is met and does not lead to a wait
root_cause: The error occurs due to a nested loop situation where the Fetch Call Details node loses track of the current item being processed. This happens when the workflow passes through a Wait node again, causing confusion in item indexing.
fix_steps: Open the Fetch Call Details - Vapi node settings.
Change the URL to: https://api.vapi.ai/call/{{ $('Create Call - Vapi').all()[$itemIndex].json.id }}
Save the workflow and test it again.
agent_instruction: Update the Fetch Call Details node URL to correctly reference the item index.
